falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above its 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the current HOLD signal and suggest a reversal of the previous bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 50 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant escalation in blowoff score would indicate heightened market stress, invalidating the current HOLD and suggesting a top rather than a bottom scenario.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average trading volume on the NASDAQ exceeds the previous 14-day average by 75%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A surge in volume would signal a potential market reversal or breakout, directly contradicting the current HOLD and pattern similarity to a prior bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
